text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
132 
GAP_INPP_COPAY_DAILY 
LABEL: 
Gap In-Network Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 1-day supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP; also known as a preferred pharmacy within a split 
network) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. Effective
